title: wolfhsm: with_xxx_key RAII pattern copy-pasted across five modules
description: The identical evict-on-drop closure pattern is duplicated in with_aes_key, with_ecc_p256_key, with_ed25519_key, with_curve25519_key, and with_rsa_key. Each copy has the same logic: save id, run f, clear id to suppress drop warning, evict, match result. Extract into a macro or a shared generic helper to eliminate the duplication.
